meta_title: Starter Series — AI writes your code. We ship it safely.
meta_description: Production-ready starter templates with CI/CD, security, and deployment baked in. Clone and ship.
hero_desc: Production-ready templates with CI/CD, security audits, and one-click deployment. Just clone and push.
section_find_desc: Pick your deployment target. Each starter includes full CI/CD pipeline, security checks, and production-ready defaults.
starter_browser_ext_desc: Manifest V3 + Chrome Web Store & Firefox AMO deployment with permission security audit.
starter_discord_bot_desc: Discord.js v14 with Docker, auto-loaded commands, and Railway/Fly.io deploy.
starter_telegram_bot_desc: grammY framework with polling + webhook dual mode and Railway/Fly.io deploy.
starter_docker_deploy_desc: Language-agnostic Docker + VPS deployment via SSH. GHCR, health checks, image cleanup.
starter_electron_desc: Cross-platform desktop builds with code signing, auto-update, and GitHub Releases.
starter_npm_package_desc: OIDC trusted publishing with provenance. Zero secrets needed for npm deploy.
starter_react_native_desc: Expo + Expo Router with EAS Build/Submit to App Store and Play Store.
starter_vscode_ext_desc: Vanilla JS extension with dual publishing to VS Marketplace and Open VSX.
starter_vscode_ext_tags: VS Code, Open VSX, Vanilla JS
why_problem_desc: AI can generate a full-stack app in minutes. But CI/CD? Security? Deployment? You're still googling YAML snippets and copy-pasting from Stack Overflow.
why_solution_desc: Each starter is a complete, production-ready template. Clone it, replace the example code with yours, push — and your CI/CD pipeline is already running.
why_points: CI/CD pipelines that actually work — not placeholder YAML
Security audits on every push (npm audit, permission checks, linting)
One-click deploy to real infrastructure (VPS, stores, registries)

how_steps.title: Clone
how_steps.desc: Use as template or git clone. Pick the starter that matches your target.

how_steps.title: Build
how_steps.desc: Replace example code with your own. Use AI, vibe code, or write by hand.

how_steps.title: Push
how_steps.desc: Git push triggers CI. Run the deploy workflow when ready. Done.

cta_desc: Clone a starter. Ship your project.
